feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error: Multiple identifiers not supported for OnDevice driver
entry.content:
I am receiving the following error when trying to query an entity from my odata service: 

Error: Multiple identifiers not supported for OnDevice driver

This is how my datastructure looks like (it's from the official SAP Asset Performance Management API)

 

Has any one ever faced this error before and knows a way to overcome it?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to Manage Startup page in SAP BUILD APP
entry.content:
Dear All,

i am new with SAP Build App. There are many pages such as FlashScreen, LoginScreen, HomeScreen. i would like to set up startup page on FlashScreen, but i couldn't find the way to do, please kindly advise.

thanks,

Ratana

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Access Denied
entry.content:
In my BTP Trail account, through the booster I have setup the SAP Build apps and activated User account also. But when I opened the SAP Build apps its saying access denied. 

Please help me to fix this issue.

entry.title: SAP Build App Combo box Usage
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying a simple use case of to display Product Description in the Combo box field by integrating with API "API_PRODUCT_SRV". I can show Product 

 

But while trying the formula unable to show Product Description (associated entity) in Combo box. Kindly Suggest

Regards,

Anam

entry.title: SAP Build App - Multiple Dates Field alignment
entry.content:
Hi,

I've multiple Dates field in the Page and with the help of Z index overlapping issue is resolved. However until enough gap is maintained in right and bottom spacing the dates are not entirely visible. Kindly suggest.

Regards,

Anam

entry.title: Obtain role collection for user in SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
How do I get role collection assigned to a user in sap build apps. 

Would like to know how to assign scope to a user. All I get is OpenID as the output.

entry.title: SAP build Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500
entry.content:
when opening up SAP build and try to start a new project, I do get the following error

"Something went wrong"
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 ()Understand this errorAI
callback:1
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 ()

my guess - seems an issue with the "Custom Identity Provider for Applications" / trust configuration but I do not know how to solve, any ideas?

entry.title: Build Apps Filter with large data
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need help to get user details in Build Apps based on logged-in user from 50,000 records fetched from destination.

Dy default able to filter first 1000 records only in SAP Build Apps.

Any lead to address this will be of great help.

 

Thank you

Prasanna

entry.title: Mashup Callback passing data to fill subject or other fields - SAP Sales and Services Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hello guys,

 

I have a problem and can't find any solution for it. I created a Mashup and implemented a navigation to quickcreate a Case in SAP Sales and Services Cloud V2. I would like to fill in some fields like the subject or a custom field within my Javascript but I cant't find anything to pass the information to the navigation.

Here is the code from the documentation:

 

 var case={operation:"navigation", params: {routingKey: "case", viewType:"quickcreate"}};
    window.parent.postMessage(ticket, '*')

 

Is there any way to pass data to the quickcreate dialog? 

 

 

Link to the documentation: Docs

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Experience SAP Build By Creating an End-to-End Sales Scenario
entry.content:
Getting error as 404 Not found when trying the below scenario when running the app. But my BPA was successful tested. Please help on where i am doing wrong. I had followed all the step provided in the link. Can someone please help where i am missing the trick?

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html.

entry.title: Error when create Actions in Process Automation with SAP Business One Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating an Actions to call Services Layer objects from Process Automation but couldn't create Actions.

I've created Destinations in BTP but when create Actions in SAP Builds errors happen

1. Destinations configuration

2. Create Actions with error

Please help to advise and share your experienced.

Thank you so much,

Best Regards,

Tam

entry.title: Unable to Integrate CAPM Service in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts !

We are unable to integrate CAPM Service into SAP Build Apps whereas we are able to integrate Northwind service as well as oData service, we would appreciate your suggestions and answers from your side. 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - API connection expand data entries not works
entry.content:
In the SAP build Apps, We are integrating SAP OData for data extraction. Using 'API_MAINTENANCEORDE' API service and 'MaintenanceOrder' Entity set, we can extract the Order header data. But when we try to extract with expand entries from 'to_MaintenanceOrderOperation', not getting any result.

Working - outputs["MaintenanceOrder"].records[0].to_MaintenanceOrderOperation

Not Working - If use item level, outputs["MaintenanceOrder"].records[0].to_MaintenanceOrderOperation[0]

entry.title: SAP BTP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm new in using SAP BTP. I used SAP Build Apps to build forms with several pages. Now, I'm trying to find the best solution to store the data recorded or captured and documents uploaded in the forms with the possibility for admin to access and view the data. I want this to be something within SAP BTP if possible.

Does SAP BTP have a database storage. If so, how can this be enabled? Is there any guidelines or steps on how to use it? 

If BTP does not have database, what is the best solution to store the data and how it can be done?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Integration of a Process Error 500
entry.content:
I wanted to send a short E-Mail with the status of an object from my app and was trying to use a process from Process Automation for that.
To learn how to do that, I tried following these tutorials:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/codejam-07-connect-app-process..html
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8RVo3-h2n-I

I created a Service Key and a Destination as it was described in the tutorials with the name "sap_process_automation_service_user_access" and set URL, Client ID, Client Secret and Token Service URL the way the tutorial said.
URL: API from Service key
Client ID and Client Secret: Client ID and Client Secret from Service Key
Token Service URL: URL/oauth/token
When I press Check Connection it says that the Connection is established (Response: 401).

The Process was also released, deployed and published to Library and it is being displayed in the Integrations Tab of my App in "SAP Build Library.

However, if I then click on any of the Processes it loads for a while and then says "something went wrong"

And in the console it throws 3 Response Errors with the Status Code 500

 

I have tried this on different days, in different browsers and on different systems. I set up the Subscriptions from the ground up and tried it again, I deleted and recreated the destination and service keys multiple times, but nothing of that has helped.
I also thought that maybe it was because the Destinations tab in the Control Tower was empty and added my destination in there as well and I have tried to use the sample process and App provided by the Youtube Tutorial, but even then the same error occured.

entry.title: Bug with Build Apps Community Edition Page disappearing
entry.content:
Every time I try to edit my page variable for my "recipeEdit" page, the page disappears. The page is still there, and I can make changes to it, but the UI is gone. I can still see the page in preview with new changes. When I restore, the page comes back. But as soon as I try to change a page variable, it goes away again. Any Ideas?

 

Ever

entry.title: Can we make Dependant dropdown and based on that dropdown selection custom list should be added?
entry.content: Can we make Dependant dropdown and based on that dropdown selection custom list should be added and that coustom list should be added multiple times while selection of the material dropdown on the click of submit button.

entry.title: SAP BTP Document Upload
entry.content:
Greetings, 

I'm trying to upload document and store them into SQL DB using SAP CPI. 

I already created the logic as follows:
Pick files > Upload files > Set data variable > Create record
I also did the integration part using REST API and linked it to CPI. 

CPI is receiving a record but no file. It is receiving what I put in set data variable (name, path, size and mimeType). 

I missing some key data that would send the file itself to CPI. 

Has anyone worked in creating file upload record in SQL DB? If so what would be the right approach?

entry.title: SAP Build with SAP Gen AI (Joule)
entry.content:
How can i create a mobile application with SAP Build App for a user to chat with Joule and then start a process in SAP Build Process Automation? EX: A field employee must deactivate an equipment for maintenance. He uses a mobile app (SAP Build App or other solution), calls and informs Joule about the serial number of this equipment ( existing in a S/4 HANA CLoud Private edition 2024) . After that, Joule starts a process automation passing the information of this equipment to an approval task of his supervisor who then receives the task in the build process automation.

Is that possible to achieve that today?

entry.title: Can not select input parameter for Action in Business Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am following below blog to replicate the same for employee relocation request - process automation.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/create-workflow-steps-using-sap-build-process-automation/ba-p/13575948

1. i have created the form
2. i have created the action and tested which works fine.
3. in the process i placed the action below form.
4. when action is placed it expects mandt field where i have to provide employee ID, so i selected input then the side panel displays fields available in the form, but i can not able to select.

process overview:

 


actions input selection from fields in form:

 

Kindly let me know what is the issue and where i am missing. Please help

Thanks,
Gowtham
